message:
fix(database): return_connection reports whether connection was requeued

DbPool::return_connection() now returns bool indicating whether the
connection was successfully placed back into the idle pool (true) or
was disconnected because the pool was already closed (false).

This fixes fill_pool() which previously incremented its `created`
counter even when the pool was closed mid-fill, causing the pool to
report more idle connections than actually existed. Now fill_pool()
only counts a creation as successful when the connection is actually
requeued.

PooledConnection::return_to_pool() ignores the return value since
the caller is just disposing of the connection and doesn't need to
track pool state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
